opinion: All speech intended for public consumption or availability must be reviewed and approved by the government; anything less is a threat to society.

The state must aggressively police speech by criminalizing hate speech, misinformation, and micro-aggressions, enforcing zero tolerance through mandatory compliance to protect social harmony and equity.
Social media platforms should be legally required to de-platform anyone who uses harmful language. Responsibility of organizations to moderate quality of content.
Offensive speech should be socially discouraged and moderated by private companies. Collective responsibility and community driven moderation and fact-checking.

Free speech is essential for democratic debate and accountability, but it requires carefully defined limits to prevent clear harm while avoiding undue censorship or abuse of power. Moderation should be conducted on a case-by-case basis.
Restrict moderation to a minimum, permitting removals only for the most extreme content - terrorism, child abuse, while leaving all other speech unchecked.
Declare absolute freedom of speech with no moderation and treat any content oversight as censorship.
Declare speech regulation as illegal, abolish regulatory agencies, and define any attempt at oversight as a grave constitutional offense.
Speech regulation in any form is outright treason and offenders should swiftly face the death penalty.
